hero_text: At AltheraCode, we craft software solutions tailored to your business needs. From concept to launch, our team perfects every detail to drive your success and scalability. Let's create something extraordinary together.
services_lead: As a dedicated software development partner, we specialize in custom AI-powered solutions — smart, scalable products across industries. We bring ideas to life and deliver value that opens doors to new opportunities.

services.title: Product Development
services.text: End-to-end product builds from discovery to a launch-ready solution.

services.title: AI Development
services.text: Custom AI assistants, copilots, chatbots and agents tailored to your workflows.

services.title: Web & Mobile Apps
services.text: Fast, reliable web and mobile applications built to scale with your users.

services.title: Process Automation
services.text: Business and intelligent process automation that streamlines operations.

services.title: For Startups
services.text: Startup-level speed with strong engineering — from MVP to product-market fit.

services.title: Dedicated Teams
services.text: A full-time, dedicated team working exclusively on your project.

expertise_lead: We provide top-tier healthcare software but go beyond to deliver cutting-edge AI and SaaS products. Whether you're transforming patient care or building groundbreaking platforms, we turn your vision into reality.
portfolio_lead: We create smart, scalable solutions across industries — optimizing workflows and enhancing efficiency.

portfolio.title: AI Audio Intelligence Pipeline
portfolio.text: An n8n-powered workflow that turns raw MP3 recordings into structured executive summaries, auto-published to Notion.

portfolio.title: AI Telegram Assistant
portfolio.text: A ChatGPT-powered Telegram assistant for instant AI conversations and scalable real-time communication.

portfolio.title: Real-Time Insight Engine
portfolio.text: An automated AI workflow that filters, summarizes and delivers personalized insights from high-volume streams.

portfolio.title: Viral Content Automation Engine
portfolio.text: An AI system that generates, organizes and scales viral-ready video concepts with minimal manual coordination.

portfolio.title: AI Voice Assistant for Claims
portfolio.text: Automated eligibility verification, claim-status support and healthcare call-center operations.

portfolio.title: Manufacturing Operations Platform
portfolio.text: An AI platform coordinating sales, procurement, operations and finance inside a live manufacturing environment.

process_lead: We transform concepts into powerful, AI-driven innovations — guiding you from ideation to launch with seamless execution and cutting-edge results.

process.title: Discovery & Analysis
process.text: We start by understanding your business needs, challenges and goals through research and consultation.

process.title: Strategy & Planning
process.text: A tailored roadmap with clear milestones, timelines and deliverables for a smooth process.

process.title: Design & Prototyping
process.text: Intuitive, user-focused designs and interactive prototypes before development begins.

process.title: Agile Development
process.text: Scalable, secure solutions built in sprints with continuous feedback and improvements.

process.title: Testing & QA
process.text: Rigorous, AI-assisted testing for top performance, usability and security.

process.title: Deployment & Launch
process.text: A seamless launch with full support during the transition to live operation.

process.title: Post-Launch Support
process.text: Ongoing support, maintenance and updates to keep your solution running at its best.

cta_title: Tech expertise that moves your business forward
cta_text: Meet AltheraCode — your strategic technology partner from day one.

faq.q: How much does custom software development cost?
faq.a: Cost depends on complexity, features, technology stack, compliance and team size. We offer flexible models such as Time & Material and Dedicated Teams. Contact us for a tailored estimate based on your goals.

faq.q: How long does it take to develop a solution?
faq.a: On average: MVP development 3–6 months, AI-powered solutions 4–8 months, enterprise applications 6+ months. We use an agile approach for faster iteration cycles.

faq.q: Will I have a dedicated project manager?
faq.a: Yes — every project is assigned a dedicated Project Manager who ensures clear communication, milestone tracking and issue resolution throughout development.
Back-end: Node.js, Python, .NET, Java. Front-end: React, Angular, Vue. Mobile: Flutter, React Native. AI/ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch. Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, Docker.

faq.q: What engagement models do you offer?
faq.a: Time & Material — ideal for evolving projects where flexibility is needed. Dedicated Team — a full-time team working exclusively on your project.

faq.q: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
faq.a: Yes — comprehensive post-launch support including performance monitoring, optimizations, feature enhancements and system scaling, tailored to your priorities.

contact_text: If you'd like to get in touch, fill in the form and our team will get back to you shortly.
footer_tagline: Full-cycle solution development for startups & established teams — strong engineering, startup-level speed.
